ps4_mode_citation: ClinGen Cardiomyopathy VCEP specifies a case-control analysis for applying PS4. This method compares the frequency of a variant in case cohorts (e.g., internal or published data) against control cohorts (e.g., gnomAD). (PS4, Strong/Moderate/Supporting sections)
